title: Otitis externa

source.title: Updated Clinical Practice Guideline: Acute Otitis Externa — Official Fact Sheet and Key Action Statements
source.population: People aged 2 years or older with diffuse acute otitis externa.
source.setting: Primary, emergency, paediatric, internal-medicine, and otolaryngology settings.
source.exclusions: Exact for diffuse acute otitis externa symptoms, modifiers, and key actions; partial for broad ear pain and not validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Fact sheet — AOE symptoms and modifying factors

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports swimmer’s-ear terminology, water exposure, ear-canal inflammation, itching, fullness, hearing change, external-ear pain or tenderness, diabetes, immunocompromise, and tympanic-membrane context.

assessment.rationale: Exact phrase located in inspected full source.

assessment.text: Supports distinguishing AOE from other otalgia or otorrhoea, pain assessment, clinician-selected topical management, administration discussion, and reassessment after non-response.
assessment.rationale: Supports clinician-documented management, symptom care, ear care, medicine decisions, return, questions, and arranged follow-up without medicine names or doses.
